axis_help.enemy: Threat count, HP, and spawn pressure. High = more and tougher enemies.
axis_help.ruler: Population growth pressure and subject demands. High = more civil unrest.
axis_help.survival: Food demand, storm frequency, and weather hazard. High = constant pressure.
axis_help.economy: Stockpile decay rate and resource scarcity. High = tighter margins.
axis_help.social: Reserved for future social simulation systems.
axis_help.impressionability: Coherence threshold for population growth. High = settlers join only when thriving.

gen_help.terrain_amplitude: Vertical height of hills and valleys. 0.25 = nearly flat, 2.0 = steep terrain.
gen_help.terrain_frequency: Horizontal scale of terrain features. Lower = broader, gentler hills.
gen_help.ore_abundance: Density of underground ore veins. 0.0 = no ore, 2.0 = rich deposits.
gen_help.tree_density: Number of surface trees. Every tree can be walked past and harvested for wood. 0.0 = barren surface, 2.0 = dense woodland.
gen_help.bush_density: Number of berry bushes on the surface. Affects early food availability.
gen_help.dirt_depth: Tiles of dirt above the stone layer (2-8 tiles).

peaceful_builder.description: A calm world for building and experimenting without pressure.
peaceful_builder.deviations: No enemies (x0). Weather and darkness disabled. Ore, trees, and bushes at 150%. All pressures reduced.

folk_kingdom.description: A balanced world. Standard challenge on all fronts.
folk_kingdom.deviations: All axes at 1.0. Default resource generation. (Balanced challenge)

tyrants_burden.description: Moderate threats but extreme political pressure — governing is the real danger.
tyrants_burden.deviations: Ruler x2.0, Social x1.75. Impressionability x0.4 (hard to grow population). Fewer enemies (x0.5).

dark_frontier.description: A hostile frontier — scarce resources and relentless enemies.
dark_frontier.deviations: Enemy x1.75, Economy x1.5, Environment x1.5. Ore/trees/bushes at 60-70% of default.

mythic_survival.description: A brutal test of survival against the hardest odds in Coheronia.
mythic_survival.deviations: Enemy x2.0, Survival x2.0, Economy x1.75, Environment x2.0. Resources at 50-60%. Enemies scale over time.
